pi_items.verified_value: Chinook database is a well-known sample database with track data derived from Apple iTunes library and synthetic customer/sales data
300000 milliseconds = exactly 5.0 minutes; > 300000 means strictly greater than 5 minutes

pi_items.metadata_value: Query filters Track table for Milliseconds > 300000
pi_items.verified_value: 1069 tracks have Milliseconds > 300000 in the database
pi_items.source: Direct SQL query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Track WHERE Milliseconds > 300000

pi_items.metadata_value: Track table has columns Name, Milliseconds, and UnitPrice
pi_items.verified_value: All three columns exist and contain valid data
pi_items.source: Query executed: SELECT Name, Milliseconds, UnitPrice FROM Track WHERE Milliseconds > 300000 returned valid results

privileged_info_summary: The Chinook music store database contains verified counts: 275 artists, 347 albums, 3,503 tracks, 59 customers, and 412 invoices. The data is real, sourced from Apple iTunes for tracks with synthetic customer and sales data. The task query criteria (Milliseconds > 300000) correctly represents more than 5 minutes (300000 ms equals exactly 5 minutes). The Track table contains the required columns (Name, Milliseconds, UnitPrice) and 1,069 tracks match the filter criteria. The query structure is valid for LibreOffice Base SQL.
